name: Configure RecordStream and Verify Waveform Data Access
description: A seismologist has completed the initial SeisComP installation. Station inventory and earthquake event data have been imported, and waveform data is stored in the local SDS archive. However, the global recordstream parameter—which tells SeisComP modules where to find waveform data—has not been configured yet. Configure the SeisComP global recordstream in /home/ga/seiscomp/etc/global.cfg to point to the local SDS archive at sdsarchive:///home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive. Generate an inventory listing of station codes from the GE (GEOFON) network using the inventory file at /home/ga/seiscomp/etc/inventory/ge_stations.xml and save the output to /home/ga/inventory_listing.txt. Extract miniSEED waveform data from the SDS archive for the time window covering January 1, 2024, and save it to /home/ga/extracted_waveforms.mseed. Ensure the SeisComP environment is correctly configured (e.g., by sourcing /home/ga/.bashrc).
